# Contribution Guidelines

## Getting Started

In order to get started, all you need to do is install [pixi](https://pixi.prefix.dev/latest/).

Then, you can compile and run Python tests as follows:

```bash
pixi run install-py
pixi run test-py
```

### Linting

To run linting for all files, execute:

```bash
pixi run lint
```

If you want to register pre-commit hooks locally, execute:

```bash
pixi run lefthook-install
```
